runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3/Java 21.
runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.why_exists: Compilation failure: package javax.servlet does not exist in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x which relies on Jakarta EE 9+ APIs.

runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.general_idea: Migrate annotation import from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in newer Spring Boot versions.
runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.annotation does not exist or class PreDestroy is not found in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x / Jakarta EE 9+.

runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using it causes a compile-time 'package not found' error on Java 21 with modern Spring Boot.

runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist'.

runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.why_exists: TransactionSynchronizationAdapter is removed in Spring Framework 6; code fails to compile with 'cannot find symbol class TransactionSynchronizationAdapter'.
